h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.statedInsightEvidence: Okay, I think the slot label test helps
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to work through the distinction between headers and cell values using the tutor's guidance.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: A field is the slot label. A cell value is row content in that slot. The header stands over the column, not inside the row.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor introduces the slot label analogy and use-test in response to the learner's difficulty, but does not perform an explicit stock-taking contrast.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent tutor uptake.
